app_release_notes: v0.17.1 - Fixes license activation, which was being blocked at the network edge (new keys got stuck in demo mode). Includes everything in 0.17.0: New Ladder, a guided flow that does the matching for you - set up your rifle and plan your ladder once, shoot it in order, then drop your chronograph and target files as-is and Loadscope matches each string to the right charge. No labeling, no renaming. Plus one-click Rework a Saved Load, and the in-app guide, manual, and Quick Start are all rewritten for the new flow.
